# PVE 環境系統資訊 - sd-sandbox-pve01

**收集時間**: 2026-05-08 13:59 UTC  
**節點**: sd-sandbox-pve01 (172.19.0.171)  
**環境**: Proxmox VE v9.1 Lab (sandbox-cluster)

---

## 1. 系統基本資訊

| 項目 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| 主機名稱 | sd-sandbox-pve01 |
| PVE 版本 | v9.1 (kernel 6.17.2-1-pve) |
| 管理 IP (VLAN 19) | 172.19.0.171/16 |
| 儲存 IP | 10.23.0.171/24 |
| 閘道器 | 172.19.1.252 |
| 叢集名稱 | sandbox-cluster |
| Node ID | 1 (0x00000001) |
| Quorum | 3 節點，需 2 票 |

---

## 2. 網路介面概覽

### 2.1 實體網卡 (Physical NICs)

| 介面 | 狀態 | MAC Address | 速度 | 用途 | 別名 |
|------|------|-------------|------|------|------|
| nic0 | DOWN | 24:6e:96:cf:20:e0 | - | 未使用 | enp26s0f0 |
| nic1 | DOWN | 24:6e:96:cf:20:e1 | - | 未使用 | enp26s0f1 |
| nic2 | UP (bond0) | 24:6e:96:cf:20:de | 10 Gbps | 管理/LACP | enp25s0f0 |
| nic3 | UP (bond0) | 24:6e:96:cf:20:df | 10 Gbps | 管理/LACP | enp25s0f1 |
| nic4 | UP (bond2) | a0:36:9f:86:ce:60 | 10 Gbps | 儲存/LACP | enp94s0f0 |
| nic5 | UP (bond2) | a0:36:9f:86:ce:62 | 10 Gbps | 儲存/LACP | enp94s0f1 |

### 2.2 邏輯介面 (Logical Interfaces)

| 介面 | 類型 | 成員 | IP 位址 | VLAN | 狀態 |
|------|------|------|---------|------|------|
| bond0 | LACP bond | nic2, nic3 | - | - | UP |
| bond2 | LACP bond | nic4, nic5 | 10.23.0.171/24 | - | UP |
| vmbr0 | Bridge | bond0 | - | 支援 VLAN 2-4094 | UP |
| vmbr0.19 | VLAN | vmbr0 | 172.19.0.171/16 | 19 | UP |
| tap100i0 | VM tap | - | - | - | UP |
| tap105i0 | VM tap | - | - | - | UP |
| tap106i0 | VM tap | - | - | - | UP |

---

## 3. LACP / Bond 配置詳細資訊

### 3.1 bond0 (管理網路 Bond)

**配置文件**: `/etc/network/interfaces`

```bash
auto bond0
iface bond0 inet manual
        bond-slaves nic2 nic3
        bond-miimon 100
        bond-mode 802.3ad
        bond-xmit-hash-policy layer3+4
```

**運行狀態**: `/proc/net/bonding/bond0`

| 參數 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| Bonding Mode | IEEE 802.3ad Dynamic link aggregation |
| Transmit Hash Policy | layer3+4 |
| MII Status | up |
| MII Polling Interval | 100 ms |
| LACP active | on |
| LACP rate | slow |
| System Priority | 65535 |
| System MAC | 24:6e:96:cf:20:de |
| Partner MAC | 02:04:96:99:d0:70 |
| Aggregator ID | 1 |
| Number of ports | 2 |

**Slave 介面狀態**:

| Slave | MAC | Speed | Duplex | Status | Link Failure Count |
|-------|-----|-------|--------|--------|-------------------|
| nic2 | 24:6e:96:cf:20:de | 10000 Mbps | full | up | 1 |
| nic3 | 24:6e:96:cf:20:df | 10000 Mbps | full | up | 1 |

---

### 3.2 bond2 (儲存網路 Bond)

**配置文件**: `/etc/network/interfaces`

```bash
auto bond2
iface bond2 inet manual
        address 10.23.0.171/24
        bond-slaves nic4 nic5
        bond-miimon 100
        bond-mode 802.3ad
        bond-xmit-hash-policy layer3+4
```

**運行狀態**: `/proc/net/bonding/bond2`

| 參數 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| Bonding Mode | IEEE 802.3ad Dynamic link aggregation |
| Transmit Hash Policy | layer3+4 |
| MII Status | up |
| MII Polling Interval | 100 ms |
| LACP active | on |
| LACP rate | slow |
| System Priority | 65535 |
| System MAC | a0:36:9f:86:ce:60 |
| Partner MAC | 02:04:96:99:d0:70 |
| Aggregator ID | 1 |
| Number of ports | 2 |

**Slave 介面狀態**:

| Slave | MAC | Speed | Duplex | Status | Link Failure Count |
|-------|-----|-------|--------|--------|-------------------|
| nic4 | a0:36:9f:86:ce:60 | 10000 Mbps | full | up | 1 |
| nic5 | a0:36:9f:86:ce:62 | 10000 Mbps | full | up | 1 |

---

## 4. Bridge 配置

### 4.1 vmbr0 (虛擬機橋接器)

```bash
auto vmbr0
iface vmbr0 inet static
	bridge-ports bond0
	bridge-stp off
	bridge-fd 0
        bridge-vlan-aware yes
        bridge-vids 2-4094
```

**橋接狀態**:
```
bridge name	bridge id		STP enabled	interfaces
vmbr0		8000.246e96cf20de	no		bond0
							tap100i0
							tap105i0
							tap106i0
```

### 4.2 vmbr0.19 (VLAN 19 管理網路)

```bash
auto vmbr0.19
iface vmbr0.19 inet static
	address 172.19.0.171/16
	gateway 172.19.1.252
```

---

### IPv4 路由

| 10.23.0.0/24 | - | bond2 | kernel |
| 172.19.0.0/16 | - | vmbr0.19 | kernel |

## 6. Corosync 叢集配置

**配置文件**: `/etc/pve/corosync.conf`

```bash
totem {
  cluster_name: sandbox-cluster
  config_version: 3
  interface {
    linknumber: 0
  }
  interface {
    linknumber: 1
  }
  ip_version: ipv4-6
  link_mode: passive
  secauth: on
  version: 2
}

nodelist {
  node {
    name: sd-sandbox-pve01
    nodeid: 1
    quorum_votes: 1
    ring0_addr: 172.19.0.171
    ring1_addr: 10.23.0.171
  }
  node {
    name: sd-sandbox-pve02
    nodeid: 2
    quorum_votes: 1
    ring0_addr: 172.19.0.172
    ring1_addr: 10.23.0.172
  }
  node {
    name: sd-sandbox-pve03
    nodeid: 3
    quorum_votes: 1
    ring0_addr: 172.19.0.173
    ring1_addr: 10.23.0.173
  }
}

quorum {
  provider: corosync_votequorum
}
```

### 叢集狀態

```
Cluster Name:     sandbox-cluster
Config Version:   3
Transport:        knet
Secure auth:      on

Quorate:          Yes
Expected votes:   3
Total votes:      3
Quorum:           2  

Members:
    Nodeid      Votes Name
0x00000001          1 172.19.0.171 (local)
0x00000002          1 172.19.0.172
0x00000003          1 172.19.0.173
```

---

## 7. 儲存配置

**配置文件**: `/etc/pve/storage.cfg`

| 儲存 ID | 類型 | 伺服器 | 匯出路徑 | 掛載點 | 內容類型 |
|----------|------|--------|----------|--------|----------|
| local | dir | localhost | - | /var/lib/vz | vztmpl,import,backup,iso |
| local-lvm | lvmthin | localhost | - | pve/data | images,rootdir |
| pve2650-nodeA-vol1 | nfs | 10.23.0.12 | /svmAvol1 | /mnt/pve/pve2650-nodeA-vol1 | vztmpl,rootdir,backup,snippets,images,import,iso |
| pve2650-nodeA-vol2 | nfs | 10.23.0.12 | /svmAvol2 | /mnt/pve/pve2650-nodeA-vol2 | iso,import,images,snippets,backup,rootdir,vztmpl |
| pve2650-nodeB-vol1 | nfs | 10.23.0.13 | /svmBvol1 | /mnt/pve/pve2650-nodeB-vol1 | rootdir,vztmpl,images,snippets,backup,import,iso |
| pve2650-nodeB-vol2 | nfs | 10.23.0.13 | /svmBvol2 | /mnt/pve/pve2650-nodeB-vol2 | iso,import,images,snippets,backup,vztmpl,rootdir |
| lab-esxi03 | esxi | 172.24.253.103 | - | - | import |

**NFS 掛載選項**:
```
rw,bg,soft,noatime,nodiratime,proto=tcp,timeo=600,rsize=262144,wsize=262144,nointr,vers=3
```

## 8. 測試參考資訊

根據測試計劃書，本環境重點驗證項目：

| 風險 ID | 風險描述 | 驗證方式 | 優先順序 |
|---------|----------|----------|----------|
| R-007 | LACP 觸發 HA 誤動作 | TC-HA-02 單鏈路故障 | P1 |
| R-009 | Corosync Split-Brain | TC-HA-03 網路隔離測試 | P1 |
| R-010 | HA 敏感度過高 | TC-HA-01 Corosync 參數調校 | P1 |

### 已知測試節點

| 節點名稱 | 管理 IP | 儲存 IP | iDRAC IP | 備註 |
|----------|----------|---------|----------|------|
| sandbox-pve01 | 172.19.0.171 | 10.23.0.171 | 10.0.4.91 | 本機 |
| sandbox-pve02 | 172.19.0.172 | 10.23.0.172 | 10.0.4.92 | - |
| sandbox-pve03 | 172.19.0.173 | 10.23.0.173 | 10.0.4.93 | - |

## 9. 常用監控指令

```bash
# 查看 bond 狀態
cat /proc/net/bonding/bond0
cat /proc/net/bonding/bond2

# 查看橋接狀態
brctl show

# 查看叢集狀態
pvecm status

# 查看 Corosync 成員
corosync-cmapctl | grep members

# 查看儲存狀態
pvesm status

# 查看網路介面
ip addr show
ip -s link show

# 查看路由
ip route show
```

---
